ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ecological_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecological site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the ecological site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the ecological site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of ecological site (e.g., forest, grassland, desert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree of the species within the ecological network */,
  "normalized_degree" REAL /* Normalized degree of the species for comparative analysis */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ecological site the species belongs to */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank of the species (e.g., kingdom, phylum, class) */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES ecological_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "species_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first species involved in the interaction */,
  "species_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second species involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., mutualism, competition) */,
  "interaction_strength" REAL /* Strength of the interaction between the two species */,
  "interaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_species_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("species_id1") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_species_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("species_id2") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the metrics belong to */,
  "PDI" REAL /* PDI value of the species */,
  "resource_range" REAL /* Range of resources utilized by the species */,
  "species_specificity_index" REAL /* Specificity index for the species */,
  "PSI" REAL /* PSI value related to the species */,
  "metabolic_rate" REAL /* Metabolic rate of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nesting_rank" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the rank belongs to */,
  "nested_rank" REAL /* Nested rank of the species within the ecosystem */,
  "clustering_coefficient" REAL /* Clustering coefficient of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nesting_rank_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betweenness" (
  "betweenness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betweenness entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the betweenness data belongs to */,
  "betweenness" REAL /* Betweenness centrality value of the species */,
  "weighted_betweenness" REAL /* Weighted betweenness centrality value of the species */,
  "closeness_centrality" REAL /* Closeness centrality value of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("betweenness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betweenness_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "closeness" (
  "closeness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each closeness entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the closeness data belongs to */,
  "closeness" REAL /* Closeness centrality value of the species */,
  "weighted_closeness" REAL /* Weighted closeness centrality value of the species */,
  "farness" REAL /* Farness value of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("closeness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_closeness_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diversity_metrics" (
  "diversity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diversity metric entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species related to the diversity metrics */,
  "fisher_alpha" REAL /* Fisher's alpha value for the species */,
  "partner_diversity" REAL /* Diversity of partners for the species */,
  "effective_partners" REAL /* Number of effective partners for the species */,
  "shannon_diversity" REAL /* Shannon diversity value for the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diversity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_metrics_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generality_metrics" (
  "generality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generality metric entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species related to the generality metrics */,
  "proportional_generality" REAL /* Proportional generality of the species */,
  "proportional_similarity" REAL /* Proportional similarity of the species */,
  "generality_index" REAL /* Generality index value for the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generality_metrics_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecological data entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species related to the ecological data */,
  "d" REAL /* Generic metric or index related to the species */,
  "ecosystem_role" TEXT /* Ecosystem role of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecological_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Whether data was downloaded or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the simulation belongs to */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)
